name: test-pharaoh
description: Write tests for Android feature branches from user story + ACs. Adheres to existing conventions, never uses mocks.

metadata.description: Claude Code plugin that writes tests for Android feature branches — driven by the user story + ACs, adhering to your project's existing conventions, and never using mocks. Three subagents cooperate: architect (project discovery), mason (test generation), physician (failure triage).

plugins.name: test-pharaoh
plugins.description: Write tests for Android feature branches from user story + ACs. Adheres to existing conventions, never uses mocks.
